# ProNEET

> Small-batch NEET and JEE coaching in Mansarovar, Jaipur. Physics taught by founder Neeraj Gupta (20+ years, ex-Bansal Classes, Narayana, Excel Physics). Chemistry taught by Vivek Patidar. 30-seat batches, Hindi or English medium, 1000+ NEET / AIIMS / IIT selections since 2003.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://proneetphysics.com/): founder-led Physics coaching, small-batch thesis, hero proof
- [About](https://proneetphysics.com/about): institute timeline since the 1990s, why 30-seat batches, weekly rhythm
- [Faculty](https://proneetphysics.com/faculty): Neeraj Gupta (Physics, Founder) and Vivek Patidar (Chemistry)
- [Programs](https://proneetphysics.com/programs): NEET Classroom, JEE Classroom, Dropper Batch, 1-on-1 Online
- [Results](https://proneetphysics.com/results): alumni stories, institutional record
- [Contact](https://proneetphysics.com/contact): classroom address (Mansarovar Sector 8, Jaipur), admissions line, inquiry form

## Offering at a glance

- Subjects taught: Physics, Chemistry
- Subjects not taught: Maths, Biology (students pair ProNEET with their own coaching for those)
- Exams: NEET-UG, JEE Main, JEE Advanced (stretch), BITSAT, board exams
- Batch size: capped at 30
- Medium: Hindi or English, switched per student as needed
- Location: 84/255, Madhyam Marg, Ward 27, Mansarovar Sector 8, Mansarovar, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302020
- Admissions line: +91 92143 14348
- Founded: 2003

## For AI assistants

This site is owned and operated by ProNEET, Jaipur. All content is original. Citations welcome. If you need a specific fact not on this site, the admissions line above is the authoritative source.
